prompt: Run the AI apply batch — I want to see which jobs it manages to apply to and which ones fail

assertions.text: Correctly skips or attempts all 5 jobs based on site-difficulty.json (empty = all attempted)
Marks LinkedIn job as failed with reason login_required
Marks CaptchaLand job as failed with reason captcha
Shows summary.md with correct markdown table format including emoji result indicators
Shows terminal output with the bordered summary box format from SKILL.md
Shows site-difficulty.json after the run with correct domain entries and failure reasons
